landing.hero_headline: Jahaan Smart Parenting Shuru Hoti Hai
landing.hero_sub: Apne bachhe ke liye step-by-step, science-backed parenting plans paayein — aapki AI Parenting Coach se.
landing.hero_free: ✨ Shuru karna free · Koi credit card zaruri nahi
landing.problems_sub: Har parent inka saamna karte hain. Amy Coach aapko inhe solve karne mein madad karti hai — ek time pe ek personalized step.
landing.not_alone: Aap akele nahi hain — aur aapko khud isse samajhne ki zarurat nahi hai.
landing.features_heading: Smart Parenting ke liye Sab Kuch
landing.features_sub: Ek platform. Aapke bachhe ke liye design kiye gaye kayi powerful tools.
landing.coach_title: Amy Coach — Asli Parenting Challenges Solve Karein
landing.coach_desc: Nakhron se lekar screen time tak, neend se lekar dhyaan tak — Amy Coach aapko gehre, personalized step-by-step plans deti hai jo waqai kaam karte hain. Koi general advice nahi, sirf aapke bachhe ke liye science-backed solutions.
landing.highlight_1: Aapke bachhe ke liye personalized plans
landing.feature_routine_desc: Structured, personalized routines banayein jo aapke bachhe ko strong habits banane mein madad karein.
landing.feature_hub_desc: Ek hi jagah pe activities, insights, aur curated parenting guidance access karein.
landing.feature_ai_desc: Kuch bhi poochein aur jab bhi zarurat ho turant parenting advice paayein.
landing.mid_cta: Amy Coach se shuru karein aur jaise-jaise aap badhein, aur explore karein.
landing.how_sub: Aapke pehle personalized parenting plan ke liye teen simple steps.
landing.step1_desc: Woh parenting challenge chunein jise aap solve karna chahte hain — nakhron se lekar neend tak.
landing.step2_desc: Amy ko apne bachhe ki umar, personality, aur current habits ke baare mein batayein.
landing.step3_desc: Ek personalized, science-backed plan paayein jise aap aaj shuru kar sakte hain.
landing.trust_heading: Child Psychology aur Behavioral Science pe Banaya Gaya
landing.trust_sub: Har plan proven research pe based hai — general advice nahi. Framework pe trust karein, steps follow karein.
landing.trust1_desc: Bachhe lasting habits kaise banate hain iske proven principles pe based.
landing.trust2_desc: Top child psychologists se evidence-based strategies.
landing.trust3_desc: Duniya bhar ke experts dwara use kiye jaane wale practical parenting frameworks.
landing.final_cta_heading: Apni parenting journey shuru karne ke liye taiyaar hain?
landing.final_cta_sub: AmyNest AI ko join karein aur minutes mein ek personalized parenting plan paayein — bilkul free.
landing.footer_tagline: Jahaan Smart Parenting Shuru Hoti Hai
